The Most Powerful Enterprise QA Platform for the
Agentic Era
GET A DEMO
WATCH VIDEO
MULTI CHANNEL AUTOMATION
Unified platform for Enterprise stack across
Web, Mobile, API, Desktop & Backend
ACCELQ LIVE
Revolutionary approach to Business Assurance in
multi-cloud packaged app environment
TRUSTED BY COMPANIES OF ALL SIZES
WHAT MAKES US A LEADER
A True Platform to achieve Continuous Test Automation
End to End Business
Assurance
Business Process focused Automation integrated across tech stack
Zero Coding
Powerful to handle real world complexities yet no-code, intuitive and scalable
Packaged Apps
Automation
ACCELQ LIVE is a Transformational Technology for Cloud & Packaged App Testing & Automation
Quality Lifecycle
Management
Unified approach for Test Design through Change Management for Accelerated Quality
Proven ROI
MULTI CHANNEL
One Platform that seamlessly
connects to all your testing needs
Works across your application portfolio of Web, Mobile, API, Desktop
The most powerful test automation tool for Web, Desktop, Packages Apps, mainframes and more
Industry first No-code, No-setup, cloud-based Mobile Automation platform across Mobile OS and Devices
The most comprehensive automation tool for API, Microservices, SSH, Backend, MQ, ESB and more
Next-generation manual testing tool with tracking, traceability & integrations
Transformational approach for Cloud
and Packaged Apps Automation
Drive Automated business assurance for Cloud and Packaged Apps with real-time Release alignment
Business process based Live packaged assets for faster time-to-market and
end-to-end integrated automation
Faster
Test Cycle
Lower effort on
Test Automation
Learn more
Top recognition from the Community
GET THE REPORT
The framework enables to kick
off the automation within no time
& Seamless integration
Sr. Manager Quality Assurance
in the Services Industry
Simple to use with intuitive UI.
Expansion of the test cases with
minimal effort.
Chief Information Officer (CIO)
in the Manufacturing Industry
Collaborate, Participate and take informed decisions
Drive cross-functional ownership of Quality where manual testers and automation engineers collaborate without technical barriers. Clear visibility for Product Owners and QA Managers enabling go/no-go decisions.
Learn How Collaboration Happens
Functional Tester
Confidently contribute to test automation efforts. Design & develop scalable automation, execute tests & review results.
IT Leader
Achieve automation-first as a core QA strategy. Gain a unified view to Automation and Manual testing under one umbrella.
Automation Engineer
Enhance productivity 3x. Elevate yourself to a Test Architect role, instead of the grunt work and wiring for common design patterns.
Learn & Grow with us
Blog
Over 1.1 million business processes were automated on the ACCELQ platform, with solid momentum among the leading companies.
Blog
Events
Explore the world of Test Automation with ACCELQ’s Live events and webinars. The test automation series that connects industry experts to attendees.
Blog
Q Academy
ACCELQ platform, with solid momentum among the leading companies in health care, financial services, and travel.
Q Academy
Get started on your Codeless Test Automation journey
Talk to ACCELQ Team and see how you can get started.
CONTACT SALES
ACCELQ named Forrester Wave™ Leader & Customer Favorite in Autonomous Testing

Test Automation at Hyperspeed
Fueled by GenAI and Q-GPT
TAKE A TEST FLIGHT
Play Video
WATCH VIDEO
Autonomous Automation for
Enterprise Scale
Autopilot transforms enterprise test automation with AI that discovers, creates, and maintains tests autonomously—all in one streamlined flow!
Power of Generative AI across
Automation lifecycle
AI Beyond Test Dev: Discover
/
Design
/
Analyze
/
Adapt
Autonomous Discovery
QGPT Logic builder
Design-First AI-Architect
Autonomous Healing
Logic Insights
AI Test Data Generation
Discover E2E flows for Autonomous Automation
Automatically identify and map out end-to-end Test Scenarios within an application context, complete with detailed step-by-step logic for automation. Pure magic!
Everyday English for Automation
Express complex business rules in plain English and generate comprehensive automation logic that seamlessly integrates front-end, back-end, APIs, and middleware!
Design & Modularity: AI for Sustainable Automation
Ensure robust and sustainable automation with AI-recommended modularity, intelligent parameterization, effective test data permutations, and more – Design-First, out-of-the-box!
Self Healing beyond Application DOM
Dynamically adapt to application changes by harnessing the core semantic and functional attributes of elements, moving beyond fragile HTML locators!
Intelligent Test Analysis & Optimization
Gain powerful insights with AI that analyzes test logic, suggests optimizations, and highlights improvements for reliability and performance—turning good tests into great ones!
AI Multiplicity for Comprehensive Testing
Automatically generate test cases with realistic data covering various scenarios. AI creates diverse combinations that validate business rules while maintaining consistency throughout your tests.
Autonomous Discovery

Automatically identify and map out end-to-end Test Scenarios within an application context, complete with detailed step-by-step logic for automation. Pure magic!
QGPT Logic builder

Logic Insights
Intelligent Test Analysis & Optimization
Gain powerful insights with AI that analyzes test logic, suggests optimizations, and highlights improvements for reliability and performance—turning good tests into great ones!
AI Test Data Generation
AI Multiplicity for Comprehensive Testing
Automatically generate test cases with realistic data covering various scenarios. AI creates diverse combinations that validate business rules while maintaining consistency throughout your tests.
“Autonomous automation with Gen AI at its best—ACCELQ Autopilot delivers accuracy, adaptability, and scalability all in one! It is extremely impressive and exceeded my expectations! The team at ACCELQ never fails to wow!”
Stephen Csiza
Principal QA Engineer
Advanced security
ACCELQ’s Commitment to Data Privacy and Ethical AI Practices
At ACCELQ, we elevate the capabilities of our cloud solutions with artificial intelligence (AI), always prioritizing the security and privacy of your data. We understand that confidence in our platform is paramount, and we are devoted to upholding the trust you place in our services.
See how we protect your data
Ready to revolutionize your test automation?
Experience AI-Powered Test Automation in Action. See how Autopilot transforms your testing processes from discovery to execution.
Ask for Demo
